tasks.label: Android: Attach or launch debug (auto device)
tasks.detail: Assembles and installs native CWS debug APK, then launches on first connected ADB device; falls back to 192.168.0.196:5555.

tasks.label: Android: Attach or launch debug (192.168.0.196:5555)
tasks.detail: Build, install and launch native CWS debug APK on 192.168.0.196:5555.

tasks.label: Android: Sync AppConfig (192.168.0.196:5555)
args: set -e; adb connect 192.168.0.196:5555 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; adb -s 192.168.0.196:5555 shell "mkdir -p /storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/config /storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/https"; for f in clients.json gateways.json network.json portable-endpoint.json portable-core.json; do src="${workspaceFolder}/../cwsp/endpoint/config/$f"; if [ -f "$src" ]; then adb -s 192.168.0.196:5555 push "$src" "/storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/config/$f" >/dev/null; fi; done; for f in rootCA.crt multi.crt multi.key server.cnf; do src="${workspaceFolder}/../cwsp/endpoint/https/local/$f"; if [ -f "$src" ]; then adb -s 192.168.0.196:5555 push "$src" "/storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/https/$f" >/dev/null; fi; done

adb connect "192.168.0.196:5555" | Out-Null; adb -s "192.168.0.196:5555" shell "mkdir -p /storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/config /storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/https"; $files = @('clients.json','gateways.json','network.json','portable-endpoint.json','portable-core.json'); foreach ($f in $files) { $src = Join-Path "${workspaceFolder}/../cwsp/endpoint/config" $f; if (Test-Path $src) { adb -s "192.168.0.196:5555" push $src "/storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/config/$f" | Out-Null } }; $tls = @('rootCA.crt','multi.crt','multi.key','server.cnf'); foreach ($f in $tls) { $src = Join-Path "${workspaceFolder}/../cwsp/endpoint/https/local" $f; if (Test-Path $src) { adb -s "192.168.0.196:5555" push $src "/storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/https/$f" | Out-Null } }

tasks.detail: Creates /storage/emulated/0/AppConfig/{config,https} and syncs stock config JSON + TLS files.

tasks.label: Android: Attach or launch debug (192.168.0.208:5555)
tasks.detail: Build, install and launch native CWS debug APK on 192.168.0.208:5555.

tasks.label: Android: Attach or launch debug (forced target)
tasks.detail: Connects ADB if needed, then builds, installs and launches native CWS debug APK on the given serial/IP:port.
